constituents: Sondera rosulata contains compounds that have been studied for their potential medicinal properties, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The flavonoids present in Sondera rosulata may contribute to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. Additionally, the plant's saponins have been reported to have antimicrobial and anti-cancer properties. The exact composition of the active constituents in Sondera rosulata may vary depending on the plant's source and preparation method. Further research is needed to fully understand the therapeutic potential of Sondera rosulata's active constituents.
